titlestmt.titleproper: Second Presbyterian Church of Fayette records6080
titlestmt.author: Compiled by S.L.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-07-10 18:20:28 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Second Presbyterian Church of Fayette records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Second Presbyterian Church of Fayette (Canoga, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Session minutes which document the acceptance and dismissal of members, selection of delegates to the Presbytery, selection of elders and trustees, and matters of church discipline. Lists of baptisms and members.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: This church was formed at Canoga in Eastern Fayette township on June 28, 1825 with eleven members. In 1834 the church, under the Geneva Presbytery built a church costing $1,700. In 1848 the pastor, Reverend Mr. Cherry, an abolitionist, led the church in withdrawing from the Presbyterian Church and in forming a Congregational organization. This decision was rescinded in 1851. In 1840 a parsonage was built, later sold, and repurchased in 1860.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Scope: Contains session minutes which document the acceptance and dismissal of members, selection of delegates to the Presbytery, selection of elders and trustees, and matters of church discipline. Periodic revivals are indicated by sudden increases in membership. Lists of members and baptisms are located in the back of the volume.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Second Presbyterian Church of Fayette records, #6080. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Information obtained from these records may not be published or otherwise released in such form that any individual mentioned in the records can be identified.

controlaccess.geogname: Seneca County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Congregational churches -- New York (State) -- Canoga.
Churches, Presbyterian -- New York (State) -- Canoga.
Presbyterian church buildings -- New York (State) -- Canoga.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Canoga.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Items of note follow:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Account of the formation of the church which lists original members and where they are from.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Confession of Faith

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church Covenant

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: First Session meeting.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of infants and adults baptised.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No records.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No records.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Received on confession of faith, 17 members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Geneva Presbytery met at Canoga to ordain Charles A. Matoon.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of causes the church will support.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Meeting to consider changing the form of church govern-ment. Church adopts Congregational form of organization.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The church instructs Rev. Cherry to withdraw the church from the Geneva Presbytery.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A judiciary committee is formed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Decisions of page 74, 75 and 79 and first section of page 80 are rescinded.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Last meeting.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of members of the church indicating whether dismissed, suspended, married or dead, some dated.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of elders, trustees and moderator, n.d.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Membership list as above.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of baptisms of children indicating name, date, parents, date of birth and sometimes the officiating clergyman.
